name: @hasna/testers
description: AI-powered QA testing CLI — spawns cheap AI agents to test web apps with headless browsers

scripts.build: bun run build:dashboard && bun run build:cli && bun run build:mcp && bun run build:server && bun run build:lib && bun run build:types
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external playwright
scripts.build:mcp: bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external playwright
scripts.build:server: bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external playwright
scripts.build:lib: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external playwright --external @anthropic-ai/sdk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
